import ognl.OgnlException;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.Collections;

public class ReportService {

    // Allowed classes for OGNL expressions (whitelist approach)
    private static final Set<Class<?>> ALLOWED_CLASSES;
    
    static {
        Set<Class<?>> allowed = new HashSet<>();
        // Allow basic Java types
        allowed.add(String.class);
        allowed.add(Integer.class);
        allowed.add(Double.class);
        allowed.add(Boolean.class);
        allowed.add(Long.class);
        allowed.add(Float.class);
        allowed.add(Byte.class);
        allowed.add(Short.class);
        allowed.add(Character.class);
        
        // Allow our domain model classes
        allowed.add(com.example.model.User.class);
        allowed.add(com.example.model.Profile.class);
        
        ALLOWED_CLASSES = Collections.unmodifiableSet(allowed);
    }
    
    // Safe OGNL context with restricted access
    private OgnlContext createSafeContext(Object root) {
        // Create context with safe configurations
        OgnlContext context = new OgnlContext(
            new RestrictedMemberAccess(),
            new SafeClassResolver(),
            null,
            new HashMap<String, Object>()
        );
        context.setRoot(root);
        
        return context;
    }
    
    /**
     * Custom class resolver that restricts class loading to whitelisted classes only
     */
    private static class SafeClassResolver implements ognl.ClassResolver {
        @Override
        public Class<?> classForName(String className, Map context) 
                throws ClassNotFoundException {
            // Only allow whitelisted classes
            for (Class<?> allowedClass : ALLOWED_CLASSES) {
                if (allowedClass.getName().equals(className)) {
                    return allowedClass;
                }
            }
            
            // Also allow primitive types
            if (className.equals("int") || className.equals("boolean") || 
                className.equals("double") || className.equals("long") ||
                className.equals("float") || className.equals("byte") ||
                className.equals("short") || className.equals("char")) {
                return Class.forName(className);
            }
            
            throw new ClassNotFoundException("Class not allowed: " + className);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Restricted member access that prevents access to dangerous methods
     */
    private static class RestrictedMemberAccess implements ognl.MemberAccess {
        @Override
        public Object setup(Map context, Object target, 
                           java.lang.reflect.Member member, String propertyName) {
            // Allow access to public getters and fields only
            return null;
        }
        
        @Override
        public void restore(Map context, Object target, 
                           java.lang.reflect.Member member, String propertyName, 
                           Object state) {
            // No state to restore
        }
        
        @Override
        public boolean isAccessible(Map context, Object target, 
                                   java.lang.reflect.Member member, String propertyName) {
            // Only allow access to:
            // 1. Public methods that are getters
            // 2. Public fields
            // 3. No access to static methods, constructors, or dangerous methods
            
            if (member instanceof java.lang.reflect.Method) {
                java.lang.reflect.Method method = (java.lang.reflect.Method) member;
                String methodName = method.getName();
                
                // Allow getters and is methods
                if (methodName.startsWith("get") || methodName.startsWith("is")) {
                    return java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isPublic(method.getModifiers());
                }
                
                // Allow toString, hashCode, equals for basic object operations
                if (methodName.equals("toString") || 
                    methodName.equals("hashCode") || 
                    methodName.equals("equals")) {
                    return java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isPublic(method.getModifiers());
                }
            } else if (member instanceof java.lang.reflect.Field) {
                java.lang.reflect.Field field = (java.lang.reflect.Field) member;
                return java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isPublic(field.getModifiers());
            }
            
            return false;
        }
    }

            return false;
        }
        
        // Block expressions that could lead to code execution
        String[] dangerousPatterns = {
            "@",  // Static method calls
            "new ",  // Object creation
            "java.lang.Runtime",
            "java.lang.ProcessBuilder",
            "java.lang.Class",
            "getClass",
            "forName",
            "exec(",
            "invoke(",
            "System.",
            "Runtime.",
            "ProcessBuilder."
        };
        
        String normalizedExpression = expression.toLowerCase();
        for (String pattern : dangerousPatterns) {
            if (normalizedExpression.contains(pattern.toLowerCase())) {
                return false;
            }
